context: Verify that the agent reproduces a vendored tool benchmark, records verified vs. reported figures honestly, produces a valid repro file with correct frontmatter, and back-fills the ANALYSIS Stage 2.2 section.

checklist.name: Existing repro check performed first
checklist.description: The agent checks benchmarks/sources/context-mode-repro.md before running anything.

checklist.name: Harness is located and invoked correctly
checklist.description: The agent identifies tools/context-mode/tests/benchmark.ts and runs it via npm run benchmark (or npx tsx) after installing dev dependencies.

checklist.name: Environment is documented
checklist.description: The repro file records OS, Node.js version, and any other relevant runtime details used during the run.

checklist.name: benchmarks/sources/context-mode-repro.md is created with valid YAML frontmatter
checklist.description: The file is created at the correct path and opens with a YAML frontmatter block containing all required fields (title, date, type, slug, source, environment, outcome).

checklist.name: outcome field reflects actual results
checklist.description: outcome is set to 'partially-verified' (or 'verified') based on what the harness actually produced — not copied blindly from the README.

checklist.name: Verified and reported figures are clearly distinguished
checklist.description: Figures from the harness output are presented separately from reported figures. Reported values are marked '(as reported)'.

checklist.name: Reported figures section present with (as reported) markers
checklist.description: The ## Reported figures (as reported) section exists and every quoted number carries the (as reported) marker.

checklist.name: How to reproduce section contains runnable shell commands
checklist.description: The section provides copy-pasteable commands that would allow a third party to replicate the attempt.

checklist.name: ANALYSIS Stage 2.2 back-filled with repro pointer
checklist.description: analysis/ANALYSIS-context-mode.md Stage 2.2 is updated to reference benchmarks/sources/context-mode-repro.md.

checklist.name: Validation script passes
checklist.description: Running scripts/validate-repro-benchmark.sh on the produced file exits 0.

checklist.name: No unfilled placeholders
checklist.description: The produced file contains no angle-bracket placeholders such as <slug> or <outcome>.
